strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React (Optilyz, RIDE Capital, re:cinq)
Active AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, Docker/Kubernetes deployments
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python are not listed in skills; Java experience is dated (Altom, 2016-2018)
No direct evidence of PostgreSQL or major cloud platforms beyond AWS CDK

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, Python coverage

response.justification: Candidate maps strongly to the core competencies: TypeScript/Node.js fullstack delivery (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq), React frontend work (Optilyz), AI agent tooling via MCP code generators (re:cinq), Docker/Kubernetes (GISCollective), and MongoDB/SQL databases. Engineering rigor is well-evidenced through TDD, pairing, and CI/CD practice at RIDE. Gaps are framework-specific (no Nest.js or Vitest cited) and language-breadth (no Kotlin/Python), but these are learnable given the demonstrated polyglot history (TypeScript, DLang, Java, C/C++, Swift, PHP). Seniority and architecture exposure clearly exceed the 6+ year bar.
